name: python3-livereload
title: python3-livereload
description:
automatic browser refresher (Python 3)
It is really boring for Web developers to need to refresh their browser
every time they save a (CSS, JavaScript, or HTML) file. LiveReload will
take care of that for you, so that when you save a file, your browser
will refresh itself - and what's more, it can perform tasks such as
compiling LESS to CSS before the browser reload.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of livereload.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use livereload because automatic browser refresher (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use livereload as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair livereload with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `livereload --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
